title: rosa × transiens
intro: Rosa × transiens, also known as Rosa rugosa × Rosa setigera, is a hybrid rose species that is native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. Rosa × transiens has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antiviral and antifungal properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications like creams and salves.
benefits: Rosa × transiens has many benefits, such as promoting improved mental health through its calming effects, reducing stress and anxiety, and even providing relief from symptoms of depression. Its anti-inflammatory properties can help alleviate pain and swelling, making it an effective natural remedy for arthritis, muscle soreness, and other conditions. Additionally, the plant's antioxidant and antimicrobial properties can boost the immune system, protect against infections, and even help prevent certain diseases like cancer and cardiovascular disease. By incorporating Rosa × transiens into one's lifestyle, individuals can experience improved overall well-being, increased energy levels, and a better quality of life.
actions: Rosa × transiens has many therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory properties, which help alleviate pain and reduce swelling in individuals with arthritis, allowing them to engage in daily activities with greater ease and comfort. Its antioxidant properties also contribute to lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, reducing the risk of heart disease and promoting overall cardiovascular health. Additionally, Rosa × transiens has been found to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent infections, thereby enhancing the quality of life for individuals with compromised immune systems. Furthermore, its sedative properties can help individuals with anxiety disorders or insomnia to fall asleep and stay asleep, leading to improved mental health and well-being.
intro_study: According to the study, rosa × transiens benefits from its reported pharmacological effects, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
constituents: Rosa × transiens has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (kaempferol, quercetin, and isorhapontigenin), phenolic acids (gallic acid, ellagic acid, and protocatechuic acid), and essential oils (containing geraniol, linalool, and beta-pinene), which contribute to its medicinal properties. These constituents have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions, including eczema, acne, and wounds. The flavonoids present in Rosa × transiens can also help improve cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, while the essential oils can aid in relaxation and reduce stress levels. Furthermore, the phenolic acids have been shown to exhibit anti-cancer properties, making Rosa × transiens a promising plant for future cancer research and treatment.
